validator_description: Heart is mildly enlarged, cardiothoracic ratio 0.6

doctor_description: Calcification at the ostium of RCA
validator_description: Interarterial course of the right coronary artery (anomalous anatomy) with moderate calcification
management_impact: Interarterial course of RCA is a congenital anomaly associated with sudden cardiac death — missed by doctor entirely; requires cardiology referral
notes: Doctor notes RCA calcification but misses the anomalous interarterial course — a clinically significant finding

doctor_description: Polymorphous linear opacities, perilobular opacities, ILA fibrotic type — 12-month follow-up + PFTs recommended
validator_description: Multiple subsegmental linear atelectasis, small round atelectasis, traction bronchiectasis — attributed to hypoventilation from chest pain; different follow-up recommendation
management_impact: Doctor's ILA interpretation requires PFTs and dedicated ILA follow-up; validator attributes same findings to hypoventilation — fundamentally different management
notes: Clinically significant interpretation disagreement: ILA vs atelectasis/hypoventilation — changes recommended workup
